catalog_content:
Item Name: The Good Hurt Fuego by Thoughtfully, DIY Hot Sauce Set, Hot Sauce Making Kit Includes 4 Skull Shaped Reusable Glass Jars, 2 Funnels, Seasonings, Gloves and Recipe Book to Make Your Own Hot Sauce Bullet Point 1: Craft Your Own Hot Sauces – Unleash your inner sauce boss with 4 badass mini skull jars, 2 funnels, a hardcore recipe book, bold seasonings, and gloves to keep your hands burn-free while you get to work. Bullet Point 2: No-Nonsense Recipe Book – Master the art of fire with easy-to-follow instructions for making four powerhouse sauces: Chipotle, Sweet Heat, Southern Lover’s, and Caribbean Heat. Perfect for those who want to spice things up without the fluff. Bullet Point 3: Own Your Heat – Take full control. Dial up the burn or keep it mellow—experiment with different heat levels and flavors to create a sauce that’s all you. This kit lets you make the sauce you crave. Bullet Point 4: Bold Seasonings for Bold Flavors – Amp up your sauces with a range of fiery ingredients: Jamaican, Cumin, Curry, Ancho Pepper, New Mexico Pepper, Cayenne, and Red Cayenne. These spices pack a punch and give your creations a deep, smoky, or fiery kick. Bullet Point 5: Gift-Ready for the Man Who Has Everything – Ready to roll as a gift! Wrap it up, throw it in a bag, or slap on a bow—this kit is the perfect gift for the guy who loves to cook, experiment, and dominate the heat. Product Description: Get ready to elevate your dishes and tantalize your taste buds with the Good Hurt Fuego DIY Hot Sauce Gift Set! This DIY hot sauce gift includes 4 reusable skull shaped bottles and all the peppers and spices needed to make the 4 included hot sauce recipes. This kit includes a recipe book, gloves, funnel and 6 peppers and spices. Flavors include Jamaican Allspice, Cumin, Curry, Ancho Pepper, New Mexico Chili Pepper, Cayenne and Dried Ray Cayenne Pepper. With heat ranging from mild to spicy, there is something for everyone!

These DIY hot sauces are everything your meals are missing! Not only can you use them on their own, but they also pair perfectly with what you already have in your spice cabinet! Because of the fun packaging, you can display the jars on your kitchen shelf or wherever you like. It also makes the perfect gift for a family member, friend, or co-worker who likes it spicy!

These hot sauces will add heat and flavor to any dish! Try adding it to pizza, chicken wings, salads, burritos or eggs. Or for fun, invite your friends over to take on the hot sauce challenge. With this DIY sauce gift, the possibilities are endless!

And if you love it for yourself, why not get one for a friend. Six unique DIY hot sauces of varying heat on the Scoville Pepper Scale, and skull shaped bottles! We're pretty sure you know someone who'd love this.

This is the perfect Father's Day gift basket for the men in your life who have everything whether it be husband, grandpa or just that special man. Value: 5.5 Unit: Ounce
brand_name: The Good Hurt Fuego by Thoughtfully
overall_summary: Premium, experiential DIY hot sauce kit with strong thematic branding (skull jars, bold artwork) and a focus on customization. Positioned as a high-value gift item with reusable glass jars and an included recipe book, suggesting a mid-to-high price point.
